title: Labrinth Leaves Euphoria Music Team
summary: Labrinth, a singer and producer from London, will not make music for the third season of the TV show Euphoria. He created the dramatic score and songs for the first two seasons, which are popular with teens. Last year, it was announced he would return with another composer, Hans Zimmer, but in March, Labrinth posted on Instagram that he was leaving and criticized HBO and Columbia. Now, reports confirm he is not involved in the new season coming out this weekend. Labrinth is still set to perform at Coachella music festival. The show's creator, Sam Levinson, said he doesn't know why Labrinth left but praised his work. Hans Zimmer, who makes music for movies, will help with the new season's score.

background_read: Euphoria is a TV drama that shows the lives of teenagers, with dramatic music that helps tell the story. Labrinth is a musician who became famous for his work on the show, making songs that many people like. Hans Zimmer is a well-known composer who has made music for big movies. This article talks about changes in the music team for the new season.
Article_Structure: WHO: Labrinth, Hans Zimmer, Sam Levinson, and HBO/Columbia
WHAT: Labrinth will not be involved in Euphoria's third season music after criticizing the show
WHERE: Reported in US outlets and on Instagram, with the show broadcast by HBO
WHY: Labrinth posted he was leaving due to issues with HBO and Columbia, and reports confirm his absence

perspectives.description: He felt unhappy with HBO and Columbia, so he decided to leave the show.
He doesn't know why Labrinth left but appreciates his past contributions.
